description: Ukrainian-made Neptune missile hits Russian Navy facility in Sevastopol Ukrainian military personnel struck a Russian Black Sea Fleet facility in temporarily occupied Sevastopol overnight on 10-11 June. The Ukrainian Navy said the attack was carried out using a domestically produced Neptune coastal missile system. Read the full article on our website
description_en: Ukrainian-made Neptune missile hits Russian Navy facility in Sevastopol Ukrainian military personnel struck a Russian Black Sea Fleet facility in temporarily occupied Sevastopol overnight on 10-11 June. The Ukrainian Navy said the attack was carried out using a domestically produced Neptune coastal missile system. Read the full article on our website

The power of unmanned systems is one of the greatest achievements of Ukraine, which proves Ukrainian leadership in technology and in saving lives thanks to technology. The number of Russian targets hit thanks to...

The power of unmanned systems is one of the greatest achievements of Ukraine, which proves Ukrainian leadership in technology and in saving lives thanks to technology. description_uk: Відзначив державними нагородами воїнів Сил безпілотних систем ЗСУ, передав орден «Золота Зірка» родині загиблого Героя, удостоєного цього звання посмертно, та вручив підрозділам бойові прапори. Сили безпілотних систем – одне з найбільших досягнень України – те, що доводить українське лідерство в технологіях і у збереженні життів завдяки технологіям. Кількість уражених російських цілей завдяки...

title: 330 drones launched
title_en: 330 drones launched
title_uk: Запущено 330 дронів
description: Ukraine attacks the Russian Federation with hundreds of drones almost every day, the "Agency" calculated. On the night of June 12, at least 330 drones were launched over Russia. This is already the fifth night since the beginning of the month when the number of drones exceeded 300. For comparison, there were only seven such attacks in all the previous months of 2026. The sharp increase began in May, when strikes on the Russian rear became noticeably larger and more regular. This time...
description_en: Ukraine attacks the Russian Federation with hundreds of drones almost every day, the "Agency" calculated. On the night of June 12, at least 330 drones were launched over Russia. This is already the fifth night since the beginning of the month when the number of drones exceeded 300. For comparison, there were only seven such attacks in all the previous months of 2026. The sharp increase began in May, when strikes on the Russian rear became noticeably larger and more regular. This time...
description_uk: Украина почти ежедневно бьет по рф сотнями дронов, - подсчитало "Агентство" В ночь на 12 июня по россии запустили не менее 330 беспилотников. Это уже пятая ночь с начала месяца, когда число дронов превысило 300. Для сравнения, за все предыдущие месяцы 2026 года таких атак было только семь. Резкий рост начался в мае, когда удары по российскому тылу стали заметно масштабнее и регулярнее. В этот раз...

title: OpenAI is preparing to reduce AI prices due to pressure from...

description: OpenAI is preparing to reduce AI prices due to pressure from Anthropic, - WSJ The reason was the rapid growth of Claude's popularity, especially among programmers. As the WSJ writes, some companies are already spending so much on AI that they are starting to look for ways to cut costs. The head of OpenAI, Sam Altman, recognized the problem and called the cost of using AI a serious issue for clients. Against this background...
description_en: OpenAI is preparing to reduce AI prices due to pressure from Anthropic, - WSJ The reason was the rapid growth of Claude's popularity, especially among programmers. As the WSJ writes, some companies are already spending so much on AI that they are starting to look for ways to cut costs. The head of OpenAI, Sam Altman, recognized the problem and called the cost of using AI a serious issue for clients. Against this background...
description_uk: OpenAI готовится снизить цены на ИИ из-за давления Anthropic, - WSJ Поводом стал стремительный рост популярности Claude, особенно среди программистов. Как пишет WSJ, некоторые компании уже тратят на ИИ настолько большие суммы, что начинают искать способы сократить расходы. Проблему признал и глава OpenAI Сэм Альтман, назвав стоимость использования ИИ серьезным вопросом для клиентов. На этом фоне...

description: Today, for the first time, we celebrate the Day of the Forces of Unmanned Systems, and from now on, June 11 will be the day of our gratitude to the soldiers of the SBS every year. It is impossible to imagine a modern war without drones, and Ukrainian unmanned systems work successfully at various levels: from performing tasks at the front to destroying important enemy facilities hundreds of kilometers deep into its territory. All this is recorded, and precisely thanks to the accuracy and...
description_en: Today, for the first time, we celebrate the Day of the Forces of Unmanned Systems, and from now on, June 11 will be the day of our gratitude to the soldiers of the SBS every year. It is impossible to imagine a modern war without drones, and Ukrainian unmanned systems work successfully at various levels: from performing tasks at the front to destroying important enemy facilities hundreds of kilometers deep into its territory. All this is recorded, and precisely thanks to the accuracy and...
description_uk: Сьогодні ми вперше відзначаємо День Сил безпілотних систем, і відтепер 11 червня щороку буде днем нашої вдячності воїнам СБС. Без дронів неможливо вже уявити сучасну війну, і українські безпілотні системи успішно працюють на різних рівнях: від виконання завдань на фронті до ураження важливих об’єктів ворога за сотні кілометрів вглиб його території. Все це фіксується, і саме завдяки точності та...
